packageRules.description: Automerge non-major updates in a single grouped PR
Major updates: separate PRs, automerge individually
Pin graphql to 16.x: @apollo/server 5 requires peer graphql ^16.11.0 and npm (Cloud Function build) rejects 17
Pin firebase-admin to 13.x: the Nitro firebase preset injects firebase-functions@latest whose peer is firebase-admin ^11||^12||^13, so 14 breaks the Cloud Function build under npm

Pin ruby to 3.x: the release-ios submit job runs fastlane, which supports Ruby 3.0+ (3.3+ recommended) and has announced no Ruby 4 support; it also caps bundler at <3.0.0, which Ruby 4's bundled version breaks. infra/ has no Gemfile.lock, so gems resolve on the runner and a bad bump would only surface while submitting a build to the App Store — no CI job runs fastlane. Revisit once fastlane declares Ruby 4 support.
